title: Intense Saudi Arabian Lettuce Salad
description: A smoky and gooey vegan-friendly Saudi Arabian dish featuring baby lettuce leaves, perfect for a hangover cure. This salad combines the freshness of lettuce with the richness of tahini and the spiciness of harissa.
instructions: Rinse the baby lettuce leaves and submerge them in an ice bath to shock them and preserve their color.
In a blender, combine tahini, harissa, lemon juice, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and garlic, and blend until smooth.
With the blender running, slowly pour in the olive oil to emulsify the dressing.
Remove the lettuce leaves from the ice bath and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a large bowl, combine the lettuce leaves and the dressing, and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the crushed pita bread over the salad and toss again to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good toss and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of smoked paprika and a few extra crushed pita bread crumbs.
